starter_code:
class Solution:
    def uncommonFromSentences(self, s1: str, s2: str) -> List[str]:
test:
def _same_unordered(actual, expected):
    return sorted(actual) == sorted(expected)

def _valid_di_string(actual, pattern):
    if not isinstance(actual, list) or sorted(actual) != list(range(len(pattern) + 1)):
        return False
    return all(
        (char == "I" and actual[index] < actual[index + 1])
        or (char == "D" and actual[index] > actual[index + 1])
        for index, char in enumerate(pattern)
    )

def _valid_restore(actual, adjacent_pairs):
    if not isinstance(actual, list) or len(actual) != len(adjacent_pairs) + 1:
        return False
    expected = Counter(frozenset(pair) for pair in adjacent_pairs)
    produced = Counter(
        frozenset((actual[index], actual[index + 1]))
        for index in range(len(actual) - 1)
    )
    return produced == expected

def _valid_no_triples(actual, a, b):
    return (
        isinstance(actual, str)
        and len(actual) == a + b
        and actual.count("a") == a
        and actual.count("b") == b
        and "aaa" not in actual
        and "bbb" not in actual
    )

def check(candidate):
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='overlap words here', s2='words here'), ['overlap'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='hello world', s2='hold the door'), ['hello', 'world', 'hold', 'the', 'door'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='hello world', s2='hello there'), ['world', 'there'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='cat dog', s2='fish bird'), ['cat', 'dog', 'fish', 'bird'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='unique words here', s2='some unique there'), ['words', 'here', 'some', 'there'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='unique words', s2='different words'), ['unique', 'different'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='single', s2='word'), ['single', 'word'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='one two three', s2='four five six'), ['one', 'two', 'three', 'four', 'five', 'six'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='same same', s2='same same'), [])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='apple apple', s2='banana'), ['banana'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='a b c', s2='d e f'), ['a', 'b', 'c', 'd', 'e', 'f'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='exclusive to s1', s2='exclusive to s2'), ['s1', 's2'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='hello world', s2='world is great'), ['hello', 'is', 'great'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='a b c', s2='a b d'), ['c', 'd'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='a b c d', s2='d e f g'), ['a', 'b', 'c', 'e', 'f', 'g'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='one two three', s2='three two one'), [])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='this apple is sweet', s2='this apple is sour'), ['sweet', 'sour'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='hello from the other side', s2='hello from this side'), ['the', 'other', 'this'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='long sentence with multiple occurrences of words', s2='words occurrences sentence'), ['long', 'with', 'multiple', 'of'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='shared unique shared', s2='unique shared unique'), [])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='abc def ghi jkl mno pqr stu vwx yz', s2='stu vwx yz abc def ghi jkl mno pqr'), [])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='python is great', s2='great language python'), ['is', 'language'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='alpha beta gamma', s2='delta epsilon zeta'), ['alpha', 'beta', 'gamma', 'delta', 'epsilon', 'zeta'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='common common words in both', s2='common words in both sentences'), ['sentences'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='repeat repeat repeat repeat', s2='single'), ['single'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='hello world from python', s2='hello world from java'), ['python', 'java'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='same same same same', s2='same'), [])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='multiple words in a sentence', s2='multiple unique words'), ['in', 'a', 'sentence', 'unique'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='alpha beta gamma delta', s2='delta epsilon zeta'), ['alpha', 'beta', 'gamma', 'epsilon', 'zeta'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='', s2='single word'), ['single', 'word'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='repeated repeated words', s2='words words repeated'), [])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='repeated repeated repeated', s2='unique word'), ['unique', 'word'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='unique words only here', s2='completely different set of words'), ['unique', 'only', 'here', 'completely', 'different', 'set', 'of'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='one two three four five six seven eight nine ten eleven twelve', s2='twelve eleven ten nine eight seven six five four three two one'), [])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='one two one', s2='three two three'), [])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='apple orange banana', s2='banana orange grape'), ['apple', 'grape'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='a quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog', s2='the quick brown dog jumps over a lazy'), ['fox'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='common words appear here', s2='here common words appear'), [])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='common common common', s2='uncommon'), ['uncommon'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='single', s2='different'), ['single', 'different'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='one two three four five six seven eight nine ten', s2='ten nine eight seven six five four three two one'), [])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='overlap this is a test', s2='this is another test'), ['overlap', 'a', 'another'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='longer sentence with many uncommon words', s2='many uncommon words longer sentence'), ['with'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='common words in both', s2='common words in both'), [])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='abc def ghi jkl mno pqr stu vwx yza', s2='stu vwx yza abc def ghi jkl'), ['mno', 'pqr'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='python java cplusplus', s2='java csharp python'), ['cplusplus', 'csharp'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='same same same', s2='different different different'), [])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='hello world hello', s2='world world'), [])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='test test test', s2='unique test'), ['unique'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='distinct words only', s2='entirely distinct words'), ['only', 'entirely'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='', s2='single'), ['single'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='repeated repeated words', s2='unique words in second sentence'), ['unique', 'in', 'second', 'sentence'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='test test test', s2='test test test test'), [])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='single', s2='unique'), ['single', 'unique'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='repeated repeated word', s2='word unique'), ['unique'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='unique word in first sentence', s2='unique word in second sentence'), ['first', 'second'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='many many words in this sentence', s2='many words'), ['in', 'this', 'sentence'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='unique words only', s2='completely different set'), ['unique', 'words', 'only', 'completely', 'different', 'set'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='unique words only', s2='different set words'), ['unique', 'only', 'different', 'set'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='this is a test', s2='this is another test'), ['a', 'another'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='same same same', s2='same'), [])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='unique word in sentence one', s2='unique word in sentence two'), ['one', 'two'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='multiple words are present', s2='multiple words are missing'), ['present', 'missing'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='overlap words in both', s2='overlap words in both'), [])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='longer sentence with more words', s2='shorter with'), ['longer', 'sentence', 'more', 'words', 'shorter'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='identical identical identical', s2='identical identical identical'), [])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='this is a test sentence', s2='sentence is a this'), ['test'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='common common words in both', s2='common words'), ['in', 'both'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='overlapping words in both', s2='overlapping words in both'), [])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='repeated repeated words here', s2='different words here'), ['different'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='distinctive words in each sentence', s2='each sentence has distinctive words'), ['in', 'has'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='a a a b b c d e f g h i j k l m n o p q r s t u v w x y z', s2='a b c'), ['d', 'e', 'f', 'g', 'h', 'i', 'j', 'k', 'l', 'm', 'n', 'o', 'p', 'q', 'r', 's', 't', 'u', 'v', 'w', 'x', 'y', 'z'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='a b c d e f g h i j', s2='k l m n o p q r s t'), ['a', 'b', 'c', 'd', 'e', 'f', 'g', 'h', 'i', 'j', 'k', 'l', 'm', 'n', 'o', 'p', 'q', 'r', 's', 't'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='unique words only here', s2='unique words are everywhere'), ['only', 'here', 'are', 'everywhere'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='one two three four five six', s2='six five four three two one'), [])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='longer sentence with multiple uncommon words here', s2='here are some uncommon words'), ['longer', 'sentence', 'with', 'multiple', 'are', 'some'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='first sentence here', s2='second unique sentence'), ['first', 'here', 'second', 'unique'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='same same same same', s2='different different'), [])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='unique words in each sentence', s2='other unique words'), ['in', 'each', 'sentence', 'other'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='common words and unique', s2='unique words and common'), [])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='shared words words', s2='words shared'), [])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='python java c++', s2='java c++ python'), [])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='overlap overlap words', s2='words overlap'), [])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='some common words here', s2='here some unique'), ['common', 'words', 'unique'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='unique word only', s2='entirely different'), ['unique', 'word', 'only', 'entirely', 'different'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='multiple multiple words in first', s2='words in second'), ['first', 'second'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='repeated repeated words', s2='unique single'), ['words', 'unique', 'single'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='one two three four five', s2='six seven eight nine ten'), ['one', 'two', 'three', 'four', 'five', 'six', 'seven', 'eight', 'nine', 'ten'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='complexity in first', s2='complexity in second'), ['first', 'second'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='', s2=''), [])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='same same same', s2='same same'), [])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='no overlap', s2='no common words'), ['overlap', 'common', 'words'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='shared words shared', s2='shared words unique'), ['unique'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='common word common', s2='word common unique'), ['unique'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='shared words are common', s2='common shared words'), ['are'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='singleword', s2='singleword'), [])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='a a a a a a a a a a', s2='b b b b b b b b b b'), [])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='repeated repeated repeated', s2='repeated unique'), ['unique'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='hello world hello', s2='world hello universe'), ['universe'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='repeated repeated word', s2='word'), [])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='common words in both sentences', s2='common words in both sentences'), [])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='a b c d e f g h i j', s2='j i h g f e d c b a'), [])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='overlap overlap here', s2='here overlap'), [])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='exclusive to first', s2='exclusive to second'), ['first', 'second'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='multiple unique words here', s2='here multiple'), ['unique', 'words'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='one two three four', s2='five six seven eight'), ['one', 'two', 'three', 'four', 'five', 'six', 'seven', 'eight'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='singleword', s2='differentword'), ['singleword', 'differentword'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='unique words only', s2='completely different'), ['unique', 'words', 'only', 'completely', 'different'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='a b c d e', s2='f g h i j'), ['a', 'b', 'c', 'd', 'e', 'f', 'g', 'h', 'i', 'j'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='overlap words here and there', s2='there and words'), ['overlap', 'here'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='single', s2=''), ['single'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='apple banana cherry', s2='banana cherry date'), ['apple', 'date'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='a b c d e f g', s2='h i j k l m n o p q r s t u v w x y z'), ['a', 'b', 'c', 'd', 'e', 'f', 'g', 'h', 'i', 'j', 'k', 'l', 'm', 'n', 'o', 'p', 'q', 'r', 's', 't', 'u', 'v', 'w', 'x', 'y', 'z'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='', s2='singleword'), ['singleword'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='uncommon word one', s2='uncommon word two'), ['one', 'two'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='single', s2='single single'), [])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='a b c d e f g h i j k l m n o p q r s t u v w x y z', s2='a b c'), ['d', 'e', 'f', 'g', 'h', 'i', 'j', 'k', 'l', 'm', 'n', 'o', 'p', 'q', 'r', 's', 't', 'u', 'v', 'w', 'x', 'y', 'z'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='repeated repeated repeated', s2='unique'), ['unique'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='a b c d e f g', s2='h i j k l m n'), ['a', 'b', 'c', 'd', 'e', 'f', 'g', 'h', 'i', 'j', 'k', 'l', 'm', 'n'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='longer sentence with more words included', s2='included more words with longer sentence'), [])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='overlap many words here', s2='many words overlap'), ['here'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='singleword', s2='different'), ['singleword', 'different'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='multiple same words here and here', s2='here and'), ['multiple', 'same', 'words'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='python programming language', s2='programming language for python'), ['for'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='abc def ghi jkl mno', s2='pqr stu vwx yza'), ['abc', 'def', 'ghi', 'jkl', 'mno', 'pqr', 'stu', 'vwx', 'yza'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='single', s2='single unique'), ['unique'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='many different words in this sentence', s2='completely different words in this sentence'), ['many', 'completely'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='only one word', s2=''), ['only', 'one', 'word'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='singleword', s2=''), ['singleword'])
    assert _same_unordered(candidate(s1='common words overlap', s2='overlap common words'), [])
